packages.name: DiscordSRV Helper
packages.description: Install and configure DiscordSRV from M12Labs, including token, channel, history, and subuser access controls.
packages.author: M12Labs

settingsSchema.label: DiscordSRV Jar URL
settingsSchema.help: Optional. If set, the install action uses this URL instead of auto-detecting the latest release.

packages.name: Minecraft Icon Builder
packages.description: Paint and save a custom 64×64 server-icon.png directly from the panel using a built-in pixel editor.
packages.author: M12Labs

packages.name: Minecraft Player Manager
packages.description: Manage Minecraft Java Edition players directly from M12Labs with whitelist, operator, ban, kick, inventory, and attribute tools.
packages.author: M12Labs

packages.name: Minecraft Startup Editor
packages.description: Safely configure your Minecraft server startup with curated presets and individual addon options. Supports Forge, Fabric, NeoForge, Paper, Purpur, Vanilla and more. No arbitrary command input — all options are validated against a secure server-side allowlist.
packages.author: M12Labs

packages.name: Minecraft Version Changer
packages.description: Switch your Minecraft server version directly from the panel. Supports Vanilla, Paper, Fabric, and Forge with live version lists, changelog previews, and automatic jar download.
packages.author: M12Labs
